title: begonia cornuta
intro: Begonia cornuta, also known as the Angel Wing Begonia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Begoniaceae family, characterized by its distinctive winged stems and fragrant, white flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Begonia cornuta include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its extracts have been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
